narrative_beat: Close de porta gotica entreaberta com feixe de luz dourada fortissima escapando, escuridao ao redor

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a massive gothic arched door of dark aged oak with iron studs, cracked open approximately ten centimeters, an overwhelmingly intense beam of pure golden-white divine light bursting through the gap, dust and embers swirling in the light shaft
subject.focal_point: the narrow gap of blinding golden light between door and frame
subject.secondary: iron hinges with verdigris patina, stone doorframe with carved crosses
props: gothic oak door with iron studs

environment.location: a pitch-black stone corridor leading to the door
environment.time_of_day: absolute darkness except for the door light
environment.atmosphere: escape route revealed, hope beyond the threshold

composition.foreground: the door gap with intense golden-white light in warm tones
composition.midground: dark oak door surface with iron details
composition.background: pitch black corridor walls, completely desaturated

lighting.key_light: blinding golden-white light from beyond the door, spilling through the gap
lighting.fill_light: reflected gold bouncing off stone floor near the gap
lighting.rim_light: gold edge on door edge and iron studs
lighting.shadow_quality: absolute darkness everywhere except the light shaft

style.post_processing: extreme halation around light source, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares radiating from gap
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles dense in light beam, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: hope, escape, the route exists but the door is closing

symbolism.primary: the narrow door of salvation — still open, barely
symbolism.secondary: divine light as the promise beyond judgment

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
tack-sharp focus on the light gap

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
